creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
This is a change in FreeType, not in terminus.  The reason you're seeing it now, rather than when FreeType was updated, is that the fonts cache is updated when a font is updated.

See https://bbs.archlinux.org/viewtopic.php?id=221794 and https://lists.nongnu.org/archive/html/freetype/2017-01/msg00019.html for some more info.
